channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jets interview Rex Ryan, who led franchise to its last playoff appearance, for head coaching job
item.description: Rex Ryan has returned to the New York Jets — for an interview, at least. The former Jets coach and current ESPN analyst, who led the franchise to its last playoff appearance to cap the 2010 season, met with the team Tuesday about its head coaching vacancy.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Titans fire GM Ran Carthon after two seasons despite big spending spree
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — General manager Ran Carthon paid the price for the Tennessee Titans going 9-25 in his two seasons. The Titans introduced Carthon as the franchise's first Black general manager in January 2023, and he helped the franchise hire a new coach in Brian Callahan a year later.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Black coaches have shot at college football title a generation after that milestone was hit in hoops
item.description: In college basketball, the scene of an African-American coach cutting down nets to celebrate a national title is nothing new.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Rams hope week off will help offense get rolling in the playoffs
item.description: The Los Angeles Rams rested nearly all of their offensive starters in their regular-season finale because coach Sean McVay wanted everybody fresh and healthy for the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Syracuse QB Kyle McCord's 5 TD passes earn him a spot on AP's all-bowl team
item.description: The expansion of the College Football Playoff has led to an evolution in how The Associated Press puts together its all-bowl team.
item.dc:creator: Steve Megargee, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Packers take huge hit on offense before playoffs as star wide receiver suffers knee injury
item.description: Green Bay Packers star wide receiver Christian Watson tore his ACL in the the teams 24-22 loss to the Chicago Bears on Sunday, delivering a big blow to the Packers offense.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bulls' Coby White throws down vicious dunk over 7-foot-3 phenom Victor Wembanyama
item.description: Chicago Bulls guard Coby White threw down an emphatic dunk on the San Antonio Spurs' 7-foot-3 phenom Victor Wembanyama on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Santa Cruz surfer Nat Young shreds during chilly afternoon session – wearing a bikini
item.description: When professional surfer Nat Young isn't competing at the World Surf League competitions around the world, it's not uncommon to see him shredding at Steamer Lane, his heralded hometown break.
item.dc:creator: Jim Seimas, The Mercury News

item.title: Australian Open 2025: How to watch on TV, betting odds and more to know
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Get ready for the Australian Open before play begins with a guide that tells you everything you need to know about how to watch the year’s first Grand Slam tennis tournament, what the betting odds are, what the schedule is, who the defending champions are and more: When i
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Suns' Beal stars as a reserve in win over 76ers and makes it clear he believes he is an NBA starter
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Bradley Beal made the most of the unfamiliar role of substitute for the Phoenix Suns. That doesn't mean he had to like it.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Antetokounmpo needs 3 stitches in finger and returns to post a triple-double in win over Raptors
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Milwaukee Bucks star Giannis Antetokounmpo needed three stitches to close a cut near the base of his right pinkie against Toronto on Monday night, and returned to the game to finish his fourth triple-double of the season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers agree to trade Gavin Lux to Reds: report
item.description: The post World Series shakeup continues in Los Angeles, as the Dodgers are poised to trade starting second-baseman Gavin Lux to the Cincinnati Reds. As reported by ESPN's Jeff Passan, the Dodgers will send Lux to the Reds in exchange for a future draft pick and outfield prospect Mike Sirota.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Bucs with Bowles celebrates another division title with dose of caution for playoff rematch
item.description: For the fifth consecutive season, the Tampa Bay Buccaneers will enter the NFL postseason, their fourth straight time as champions of the NFC South.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bill Belichick focused on UNC, not worried about Patriots after his replacement got fired after 1 season
item.description: With the New England Patriots already moving on from his replacement after one season, Bill Belichick was candid in his response to the news as he continues focusing on UNC.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tough, old school defense a calling card for all four teams left in the national championship hunt
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — The expanded College Football Playoff has a decidedly old-school feel: Smothering defenses have carried the last four teams still in the hunt for the national championship. If you want offense, look elsewhere this weekend.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Novak Djokovic says he still feels 'trauma' when he travels to Australia because of his deportation
item.description: Novak Djokovic said he still feels “a bit of trauma” when he travels to Australia, stemming from his deportation in 2022 because he was not vaccinated against COVID-19.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden signs RFK Stadium land bill into law, a step toward potential Commanders stadium in Washington
item.description: President Joe Biden signed into law a bill that transfers the land that includes the old RFK Stadium from the federal government to city control, the next step to potentially pave the way for the NFL's Washington Commanders to return to the nation's capital.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Final field for 2025 Farmers Insurance Open in San Diego shaping up
item.description: The 2025 Farmers Insurance Open is set to take place in San Diego from January 22-25, 2025, featuring a field of major championship winners, past winners, and players with San Diego ties. Tickets went on sale in October.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: David Wright's No. 5 to be retired by New York Mets on July 19
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — David Wright's No. 5 will be retired by the New York Mets before a July 19 game against Cincinnati, the team said Monday. Wright's number will be the 10th retired by the Mets, the sixth since Steve Cohen bought the team ahead of the 2021 season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lawsuit alleges ex-Fox Sports host Skip Bayless harassed hairstylist, offered her $1.5 million for sex
item.description: The complaint claims Fox executives fostered a hostile work environment that allowed senior managers and on-air personalities including Bayless to abuse workers without fear of punishment.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bears rally for 24-22 win in Green Bay as Packers lose Love and Watson to injuries
item.description: Caleb Williams drove Chicago to Cairo Santos' 51-yard field goal as time expired and the Bears snapped a 10-game skid with a 24-22 victory over the playoff-bound Green Bay Packers, who lost quarterback Jordan Love and wide receiver Christian Watson to injuries on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears walk-off the Packers to end the season 5-12
item.description: GREEN BAY, Wisc. (WGN) — For the first time in weeks, The Chicago Bears showed life in the NFL's oldest rivalry and found a way to win at the end of the ballgame. Here's how their final contest of the 2024-25 regular season played out.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC falls in overtime to Dallas, 3-2
item.description: DALLAS (AP) - Thomas Harley scored 3:01 into overtime to give the Dallas Stars their fourth straight win, 3-2 against the Utah Hockey Club at American Airlines Center on Saturday. Matt Duchene found Harley near the right post after collecting his own rebound in front of the net.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Knicks visit conference foe Chicago Saturday
item.description: New York Knicks (24-11, third in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (15-19, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Knicks -5.5; over/under is 235.5 BOTTOM LINE: Chicago takes on New York in Eastern Conference action Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: BBB provides tips on buying Detroit Lions tickets, avoiding scams
item.description: The Better Business Bureau of West Michigan is providing some tips if you’re looking to buy tickets to the Detroit Lions game on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Meghan Bunchman, NewsNation

item.title: Verizon to bring Super Bowl FanFest to life in 30 cities, offering NFL championship hype nationwide
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Caesars Superdome may be the epicenter for the Super Bowl in New Orleans next month, but Verizon has a game plan to ensure the championship excitement stretches beyond the Big Easy.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Postponed Sugar Bowl played with enhanced security about 36 hours after terror attack in New Orleans
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Georgia and Notre Dame fans packed a plaza adjacent to the Superdome and enjoyed music under clear skies — under the watch of snipers on rooftops — before filtering into the stadium for Thursday's College Football Playoff quarterfinal at the Sugar Bowl. “It was a lot of fun.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Defense and special teams lift Notre Dame to 23-10 win over Georgia in Sugar Bowl CFP quarterfinal
item.description: In a game that was delayed by a day because of a deadly terror attack in the host city, Notre Dame (13-1, CFP No. 5) made enough big plays.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Allstate Sugar Bowl postponed
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Caesars Superdome was placed under lockdown Wednesday after a pickup truck drove into a New Year’s crowd about a mile away, killing at least 15 people and injuring dozens, city and federal officials said.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Sugar Bowl in New Orleans postponed after deadly truck attack
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The College Football Playoff quarterfinal at the Sugar Bowl between Georgia and Notre Dame has been postponed after a truck plowed into a New Year’s crowd about a mile away early Wednesday, killing at least 10 people.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Blues have all the fun in convincing victory over the Blackhawks in the Winter Classic
item.description: The Winter Classic returned to Wrigley on the final day of 2024, and the Chicago Blackhawks threw quite a party but ended up on the losing end.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Holiday Classic: Father Judge 80, Carlsbad 70
item.description: In the Third-Place game for the National Bracket of the 2024 Holiday Classic, Father Judge High School from Philadelphia, PA defeats Carlsbad 80-70.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5
